morning.content: 67% of Fortune 500 companies have a GenAI initiative in production. Only 12% report measurable ROI. The gap between deployment and value is the biggest story in enterprise tech. Most are stuck in the pilot forever phase.

hero.ig_caption:
html-video turns code into MP4s, locally, for free. Coding agents can now ship finished video products, not just software. What would you automate if video was just another output format?

#ai #tech #developer #startup #coding #automation #futureofwork #aitools
